item.dc:creator: AvsFreak

item.title: 20kg (44 pounds) weightloss! Excuse the selfie
item.description: Sorry for breaking the selfie rule but I'm really proud of myself. Staring out at 98kg, I've finally hit 78kg- 20kg (44 pounds) in total and 6 inches around my waist! Another 5 to 10 kg to go! I've achieved it by changing up my diet and gradually loosing the weight over the past 6 months. I want to start adding in some more exercise as I am having some loose skin issues. Any recommendations for exercises, id love to hear them in the comments! I don't have much of a support network so you guys are it!
item.dc:creator: katvonvixen

item.dc:creator: VividCats

item.title: Monday morning Illusions
item.description: A brief comment on emotions ------ When we are "fooled" (like during optical illusions or pranks) some people get angry as their first, primary emotion. The more intense version of anger, shown in the emotion wheel above, can be called RAGE. And some feel the lighter version of anger called ANNOYANCE. These aren't the only words which could be used. Also, generally, we humans can experience MORE than one emotion at a time. Messy. In general, emotions just happen. Generally we can't really stop emotions from happening. They just do. The best most can hope for is to name and process them as best we can. I apologize in advance to anyone who felt any version of anger. It wasn't my intention for your journey today. I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Hundreds of thousands of Israelis protest against Netanyahu
item.description:
More than 200,000 people gathered in the center of Tel Aviv in the evening.
Early in the morning, demonstrators blocked numerous roads across the country, including a major highway in the coastal city of Tel Aviv. A nationwide strike has been called for Sunday, the start of the Israeli work week.
Speakers and participants called for an end to the Gaza war and the immediate release of the Hamas hostages. They also called on the Israeli government to reverse its decision to take the city of Gaza and other areas in the Gaza Strip. “The Israeli government never made a serious attempt to secure the release of the hostages through a comprehensive agreement".
On October 7, 2023, in an unprecedented massacre, terrorists killed around 1,200 people and abducted more than 250 others as hostages to the Gaza Strip. Since then, according to the Palestinian Health Ministry, nearly 62,000 Palestinians have been killed. The number does not distinguish between civilians and combatants.
The far-right Israeli finance minister Bezalel Smotrich called the protests a “bad and harmful campaign that plays into the hands of Hamas.” Netanyahu and his accomplices have the Gaza war to thank for their hold on power. Free Gaza. Fuck Antisemitism.

item.dc:creator: wadatahmydamie

item.title: Disheartening.
item.description: Not too long ago an Imgurian made a post about their mental health that I resonated with due to suffering similarly. Sent them my Discord. We chatted for a while and got along pretty well. Then came the topic of immigration and ICE. I'm a Russian immigrant that had to deal not only with ICE but with the CIA due to being alone, not having any documents, and being a minor and victim of trafficking. This was at a time when ICE wasn't so genocidal. When expressing my frustration, their next sentence started with: "As someone who has worked extensively for both agencies..." And it just went from there. Blocked them on Discord and here. They refused to believe that ICE would do the things they do for no reason and that the CIA was even involved in my immigration when I remember almost every single harrowing and traumatic moment of how I was treated. A lot of my cPTSD is from my experience. Having that invalidated by someone I had just begun to trust stung a lot. It was disheartening to hear. I'm not naming names because while I'm petty, I'm not an asshole.
item.dc:creator: TheGirlWithRedHair1295

item.dc:creator: siflandollysiflandollyshowROCK

item.title: Time to Stand Up
item.description: Edit: Holy Shit, I made front page for the first time ever! Thanks, everyone. And seriously, please consider my requests at the end of the paragraph below. Stay the fight, hold the line, and never, never give up. Editorial cartoon by Luckovich from the Atlanta Urinal and Constipation. Ahem, sorry- the Journal and Constitution. (sorry, as an Atlanta native, old habits die hard. I have nothing but respect for all unbiased, ethical journalists!) The original Tiananmen Square Massacre happened my junior year of high school. I still distinctly remember watching the video of the original "Tank Man" on the news, showing great bravery in his defiance. I really, sincerely hope we do not see anything even remotely as horrible happen on the streets of D.C. (or anywhere in America) as happened in Tiananmen. For me, that would be a day even darker than 9/11. Which is saying A LOT. We are in dark times, my friends. Stay safe, watch out for your friends and families, stand up for and support your neighbors that are facing persecution, and above all, DO NOT let that orange motherfucker take over our country without a fight!

item.title: ICE shoots car - Lies about assault - video proves it
item.description:
“The Department of Homeland Security says that during the vehicle stop, a subject refused to exit his vehicle and tried to run Customs and Border Protection (CBP) officers down. DHS says he struck two officers with his vehicle, and that one officer had to discharge his firearm in self-defense. The video reviewed by Eyewitness News does not show the driver trying to run the officers down. The agency did not answer our questions about why the driver was stopped or whether the agents had an administrative or judicial warrant. https://abc7.com/post/federal-agents-fire-shots-man-during-operation-san-bernardino-police-say/17562097/
https://abc7.com/post/federal-agents-fire-shots-man-during-operation-san-bernardino-police-say/17562097/
https://abc7.com/post/federal-agents-fire-shots-man-during-operation-san-bernardino-police-say/17562097/

item.title: BOROWITZ: “Even I know the difference between Alaska and Russia.”
item.description: ANCHORAGE (The Borowitz Report)—Sarah Palin’s tenure as the dumbest person to set foot in the state of Alaska came to an abrupt end on Friday. Speaking to reporters, the former governor was philosophical about losing her crown of idiocy, declaring, “I had a good run.” Watching the newly-minted king of stupid ramble incoherently at a press conference in Anchorage, Palin observed, “Whoa—now there’s a moron!” As for how he clinched the title, Palin opined, “Even I know the difference between Alaska and Russia.”

item.dc:creator: unclefishbits

item.title: Texas Department of State Health is not exactly the most reliable source for health information...
item.description: Via https://www.cnn.com/2025/08/18/health/texas-measles-outbreak-declared-over This outbreak was also responsible for spreading to Oklahoma, Kansas, and New Mexico, and there were 3 cases reported in N.M. last Thursday that DHS officials there indicated were part of the larger outbreak starting in Texas. Texas DHS has also recommended that trying to push for acceptance of a measles vaccine is actually driving people away and so vaccine messaging should be reduced or eliminated. To give you an idea of the outbreak, of the ~1350 people who have been reported with measles so far this year, 762 of them (more than half) were reported in Texas only, from THIS outbreak. Which is still confirmed as ongoing in the bordering state(s). CDC had sent a whole 3-person team there in March, but had to recall it in April due to all those jobs being cut, so it's not like there's any legitimate oversight.
item.dc:creator: quietwalker

item.title: Weasel the cat thinks the hot silverware rack is perfect place for a nap
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: It be like that
item.description:
It’s crazy to me how many people understand how evil companies like Blackstone are, but don’t understand they are the inevitable result of ✨capitalism✨ The rich people of the world do not want to compete. They want to set up toll booths on things we need to live and extort you for as much as they can.
If private ownership is the issue, collective ownership is the solution. That’s all capitalism and socialism are. Do we let random rich assholes own everything? Or do we collectively own everything. Those are the two options, and the one we’re doing sucks
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44
